title: Propose ADR 0006 for deterministic numeric and phase contracts
summary: Produce the proposed PRNG/fixed-point/phase contract ADR for M1 deterministic numeric semantics, command phases, async version checks and stable ordering.
acceptance: ADR-0006 is created with Status Proposed and covers alternatives, migration, rollback, test and performance implications
Integer and fixed-point conventions are explicit for map cost, job progress, item quantities and scores
Tick phases, command commit order and async result version rejection are specified
No reliance on Math.random, real time, promise chains or thread completion order enters authoritative state
